description: A vertical graphic. The upper portion is a photograph of a handcuffed person seen from behind in a green sweatshirt, with the hands cuffed behind the back and an officer in camouflage standing beside them. A green panel below holds a Department of Homeland Security seal, the words U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services, and white text reading Think Breaking the Law Won't Affect Your Immigration Case? Think again. Criminal aliens will NOT walk out of USCIS offices with citizenship.
notable_text: U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; Think Breaking the Law Won't Affect Your Immigration Case?; Think again. Criminal aliens will NOT walk out of USCIS offices with citizenship.
